name: a4mc_gameplay_sample
value: GameplayWindSample exposes mean/effective/gust velocity, pressure, turbulence, shear, shelter, confidence, and ABL diagnostics used by FPV Dronecraft.
note: Reference surface for A4MC disk-gradient calibration packet.

name: a4mc_minecraft_api
value: AeroMinecraftWindApi supplies runtime gameplay samples without adding Aerodynamics4MC classes to drone-sim-core.
note: Reference surface for A4MC disk-gradient calibration packet.

name: fpv_drone_entity_disk_sampler
value: DroneEntity samples rotor-center and disk-edge A4MC flow, applies per-sample quality during wind and pressure-gradient blending, then passes adopted disk gradients into the core.
note: Reference surface for A4MC disk-gradient calibration packet.

name: fpv_core_disk_gradient_response
value: DronePhysics maps rotor disk wind gradient into thrust loss, load, vibration, stall, and flapping proxies.
note: Reference surface for A4MC disk-gradient calibration packet.
